$comment: Starter mapping of the harness onto opencode. Merge into your repo's opencode.json. Pin your opencode version — upstream ships breaking changes often. Lanes per models/routing.yaml: set your real provider/model ids.

build.$comment: bulk lane — implementation against an approved plan (GLM via Anthropic-compatible provider); its output merges only after a frontier-lane review (rubric MG6)

reviewer.$comment: fresh-context reviewer agent — mirror of agents/code-reviewer.md
